basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Research Associate and Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BHU. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the BHU Research Associate and Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and 2 years of research experience for Research Associate. English proficiency and computer knowledge required.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Post graduate in social science discipline (55% minimum) NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. 2 years of research experience as a Research Assistant in any Project Research Assistant: Post graduate in social science discipline (55% minimum) NET/M.Phil./Ph.D.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Associate: Rs. 47,000/-, Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/-
salary_details.details: Research Associate: Rs. 47,000/- Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/-

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate and Research Assistant positions at Banaras Hindu University is 14th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Banaras Hindu University for the posts of Research Associate (1 post) and Research Assistant (1 post).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these BHU posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in a social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. for both posts. Research Associate also requires 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Research Associate and Research Assistant?
faq.answer: The selected Research Associate will receive a salary of Rs. 47,000/- per month, while the Research Assistant will be paid Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Research Associate and Research Assistant positions at Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these BHU jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Banaras Hindu University located?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive at Banaras Hindu University is M-28/0062.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through postal mail?
faq.answer: No, postal communication will not be entertained for this recruitment. Applications must be submitted via email only.
